connectionDetails.name: host
connectionDetails.label: Host
connectionDetails.description: Hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server

connectionDetails.name: port
connectionDetails.label: Port
connectionDetails.description: Port on which PostgreSQL is running (default: 5432)

connectionDetails.name: databaseName
connectionDetails.label: Database Name
connectionDetails.description: Name of the target PostgreSQL database

connectionDetails.name: ssl
connectionDetails.label: Enable SSL
connectionDetails.description: Whether to use SSL for the connection

connectionDetails.name: sslmode
connectionDetails.label: SSL Mode
connectionDetails.description: SSL mode for the connection. Only applicable when SSL is enabled.

connectionDetails.name: connectTimeout
connectionDetails.label: Connection Timeout (seconds)
connectionDetails.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for a connection

connectionDetails.name: applicationName
connectionDetails.label: Application Name
connectionDetails.description: Optional application name shown in pg_stat_activity
